aboutMe.bio: My personality is sociable, open-minded, and respectful, dedicated to work. My lifelong journey of overcoming a speech disorder condition demonstrates my exceptional resilience, effort and determination. I aim to keep moving forward to sharpen my knowledge and pursue my dreams of becoming an advanced developer.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
points: Responsive UI with Next.js, React.js & RemixJS
Engaging animations to enhance user experience

cloud.title: Cloud & Performance
points: Cloudflare Workers reverse proxy & load balancing

database.title: Database & Optimization
points: DB design, query optimization, performance tuning
Caching strategies & monitoring for stable systems

edu.university: Ho Chi Minh City University of Foreign Languages and Information Technology (HUFLIT)

fsb.company: FPT School of Business and Technology (FSB)
fsb.description: Developed web applications and tools with Google Apps Script to automate administrative tasks and quarterly reporting. Built a school website and class management app (ReactJS, TailwindCSS), an asset management system (Google Sheets + Forms), and a library management app with barcode scanning. Provided on-site technical assistance during events and supported users on LMS platforms.

whammy.description: Developed the company website using RemixJS, TailwindCSS, and AWS S3 — storing candidate CVs in S3 with Slack Webhook notifications. Built a Metaverse event calendar with NextJS and automated data sync from API. Integrated multiple UK delivery service APIs into a logistics application.

logsignt.subtitle: SaaS Log Monitoring Platform
logsignt.description: Production-grade SaaS for real-time application log ingestion, monitoring, and alerting. Multi-tenant architecture with JWT/OAuth SSO, TOTP 2FA, role-based access, SSE log streaming, geo-traffic visualization, and multi-channel alerts (Telegram, Discord, Slack, Email). Fully deployed on Cloudflare edge.

fsb.subtitle: FPT School of Business and Technology
fsb.description: School website with class schedule, academic transcripts, and quarterly report display. Asset management system tracking location, quantity, and borrower data via Google Sheets + Forms. Library management app with barcode scanning for automated book check-in/check-out.

whammy.subtitle: Fullstack — Whammy Tech
whammy.description: Company profile website showcasing services, recruitment, and achievements. Candidate CVs stored in AWS S3 with Slack Webhook notifications on submission. Includes animated UI built with RemixJS and Framer Motion.

crypto.subtitle: Chrome Extension
crypto.description: Chrome extension giving traders quick crypto price checks and market news. ReactJS UI with ExpressJS backend deployed across multiple instances, load-balanced and cached via Cloudflare Workers reverse proxy.

art.subtitle: Film Acting & Visual Arts
art.description: Film Acting (1st Grade): A unique childhood milestone. Early exposure to film sets, cameras, and lighting not only built my confidence in front of an audience but also nurtured a lifelong passion for visual arts and framing that continues to this day.

callspam.subtitle: Cross-Platform Mobile App
callspam.description: Phone number identification and spam-call blocking app. Elasticsearch powers high-speed data retrieval; NGINX handles distributed query processing. React Native UI with cross-platform support and deep customization. Fully containerised with Docker.
